definition: quotient of the relative decrease caused by absorption of the spectral concentration of the radiant flux Φe, λ of a collimated beam during its propagation along an elementary length dl at the point considered, by the length dl

definition_ml.en: quotient of the relative decrease caused by absorption of the spectral concentration of the radiant flux Φe, λ of a collimated beam during its propagation along an elementary length dl at the point considered, by the length dl
definition_ml.de: Quotient der relativen Abnahme, verursacht durch Absorption der spektralen Konzentration des Strahlungsleistung Φe, λ eines gebündelten Strahls während seiner Propagation entlang einer elementaren Länge dl am betrachteten Punkt, durch die Länge d

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: quotient of the relative decrease caused by absorption of the spectral concentration of the radiant flux Φe, λ of a collimated beam during its propagation along an elementary length dl at the point considered, by the length dl
raw_properties.MDC_P006.de: Quotient der relativen Abnahme, verursacht durch Absorption der spektralen Konzentration des Strahlungsleistung Φe, λ eines gebündelten Strahls während seiner Propagation entlang einer elementaren Länge dl am betrachteten Punkt, durch die Länge d
